projects.name: Order Service
projects.description: Core order management service handling order creation, status tracking, and the full order lifecycle from placement through fulfillment

entries.description: Order store database connection
Redis for order state cache and idempotency keys
Service identifier
Azure Service Bus namespace connection string for publishing order domain events (OrderPlaced, OrderCancelled, OrderDispatched)
Number of Service Bus delivery attempts before a message is moved to the dead-letter queue
Initial back-off delay in milliseconds between Service Bus retry attempts
Additional delay in milliseconds added to the back-off on each subsequent retry
Pricing Engine API base URL for real-time price lookups during order creation
API key for authenticating requests to the Pricing Engine
Inventory Service API base URL for stock reservation checks during order placement
API key for authenticating requests to the Inventory Service
Notifications Service API base URL for dispatching order confirmation and status-update emails
API key for authenticating requests to the Notifications Service
Log level for the order domain event handlers — increased verbosity aids incident diagnosis
When enabled, payment is captured immediately at order placement; when disabled, capture is deferred to dispatch
Allows an order to be split across multiple warehouse shipments when items are held in different locations
Comma-separated origins permitted to call the Order Service API — restrict to storefront and admin in production

projects.name: Order Processor
projects.description: Asynchronous worker that processes order state machine transitions, applies business rules, and emits domain events to downstream fulfillment and notification services

entries.description: Order processing queue and state store
RabbitMQ for order domain events
Service identifier

projects.name: Cart Service
projects.description: Manages shopping cart state for authenticated and anonymous users with real-time stock reservation, price lock, and cart merge on login

entries.description: Redis for cart session storage
Service identifier
Duration in minutes before an anonymous cart session expires

projects.name: Checkout Service
projects.description: Orchestrates the checkout flow: validates cart contents, applies promotions, triggers payment authorisation, and submits confirmed orders

entries.description: Checkout session and order confirmation store
Service identifier
Maximum number of line items permitted per checkout order
Azure Blob Storage connection for persisting order confirmation documents and invoice PDFs
Cart Service API base URL for reading the current cart during checkout initialisation
API key for authenticating requests to the Cart Service
Payments Service API base URL for authorising and capturing payments at checkout
API key for authenticating requests to the Payments Service
Tax calculation API base URL for computing VAT and regional tax obligations at checkout
API key for authenticating requests to the Tax Service
Fraud Detection API base URL for real-time risk scoring of each checkout attempt
API key for authenticating requests to the Fraud Detection Service
Allows customers to complete a checkout without creating or signing into a Meridian account
Enables one-click express checkout using stored payment methods and default delivery address
Comma-separated origins allowed to initiate checkout — storefront and native app gateway in production

projects.name: Pricing Engine
projects.description: Calculates real-time product prices by applying tier pricing, customer-segment rules, volume discounts, and active promotions

entries.description: Pricing rule and tier configuration store
Redis for computed price cache
Service identifier

projects.name: Discount Service
projects.description: Manages coupon codes, promotional campaigns, and automatic discount rules; validates redemption eligibility and tracks usage limits

entries.description: Discount campaign and redemption store
Service identifier
Maximum number of discount codes that can be applied to a single order

projects.name: Product Catalog
projects.description: Authoritative product data store: SKUs, descriptions, images, attributes, categorisation, and localised content for all markets

entries.description: Product definition and attribute store
Redis for product data cache
Service identifier

projects.name: SKU Manager
projects.description: Manages Stock Keeping Unit definitions, variant trees (size, colour, configuration), and barcode registrations for warehouse and POS integration

entries.description: SKU and variant definition store
Service identifier
Maximum number of product variants (SKUs) per base product definition

projects.name: Fulfillment Service
projects.description: Routes confirmed orders to the appropriate warehouse or third-party fulfillment partner, generates pick lists, and tracks packing and dispatch milestones

entries.description: Fulfillment workflow and allocation store
Service identifier
Default warehouse code used when no routing rule matches an order
Azure Service Bus namespace connection string for consuming OrderPlaced events and publishing FulfillmentDispatched events
Number of Service Bus delivery attempts before a fulfillment event is dead-lettered
Initial back-off delay in milliseconds between Service Bus retry attempts
Azure Blob Storage connection for storing generated pick-list and dispatch manifest PDFs
Inventory Service API base URL for allocating and reserving stock at fulfillment routing time
API key for authenticating requests to the Inventory Service
Shipping Rates Service API base URL for requesting carrier-specific shipping labels on dispatch
API key for authenticating requests to the Shipping Rates Service
When enabled, eligible orders can be routed to third-party 3PL fulfillment partners rather than Meridian-operated warehouses
Automatically generates warehouse pick lists when an order is allocated, without manual intervention

projects.name: Returns Service
projects.description: Manages the customer returns workflow from RMA creation, label generation, and warehouse receipt through to refund initiation

entries.description: RMA and returns tracking store
Service identifier
Number of days after delivery within which returns are accepted

projects.name: Refund Processor
projects.description: Processes approved refunds by triggering payment reversals, updating order financials, and notifying customers via the notification service

entries.description: Refund request and ledger store
RabbitMQ for refund request events
Service identifier

projects.name: Shipping Rates Service
projects.description: Aggregates real-time shipping quotes from DHL, FedEx, and Royal Mail using carrier APIs, applies markup rules, and returns ranked options to checkout

entries.description: Redis for carrier rate cache
Service identifier
How long carrier rate quotes are cached before a live re-fetch

projects.name: Delivery Estimate Service
projects.description: Calculates estimated delivery windows using carrier lead times, warehouse dispatch schedules, and regional cut-off times

entries.description: Carrier schedule and dispatch calendar store
Service identifier
Fallback delivery lead time in days when no carrier-specific estimate is available

projects.name: Backorder Service
projects.description: Manages backorder queues for out-of-stock items, notifies customers when stock is replenished, and auto-reserves inventory for the queued orders

entries.description: Backorder queue and notification schedule
Service identifier
Maximum number of customers that can join a backorder queue per SKU

projects.name: Quote Service
projects.description: Generates time-limited price quotes for B2B customers including bulk pricing, custom terms, and multi-currency support with approval workflows

entries.description: Quote and approval workflow store
Service identifier
Number of days a generated quote remains valid for acceptance

projects.name: Voucher Service
projects.description: Manages gift vouchers and store credit balances: issuance, redemption, balance enquiry, and expiration enforcement

entries.description: Voucher balance and transaction ledger
Service identifier
Default expiry period in months for newly issued vouchers

projects.name: Loyalty Engine
projects.description: Calculates and manages loyalty points: earning rules, tier progression, point expiry, and redemption at checkout for registered customers

entries.description: Loyalty account and transaction store
Service identifier
Loyalty points awarded per £1 of qualifying spend

projects.name: Tax Calculator
projects.description: Computes VAT, GST, and sales tax obligations for every order line using jurisdiction rules, product tax codes, and customer exemption certificates

entries.description: Tax rate and jurisdiction rule store
Service identifier
Default VAT rate applied when no product-specific tax code is matched

projects.name: Subscription Billing
projects.description: Manages recurring subscription plans: billing cycles, proration, dunning workflows for failed payments, and mid-cycle plan changes

entries.description: Subscription plan and billing cycle store
Service identifier
Maximum payment retry attempts before a subscription is suspended

projects.name: Wishlist Service
projects.description: Manages customer wish lists and saved-for-later carts; supports sharing, price-drop notifications, and conversion analytics

entries.description: Wishlist and saved item store
Service identifier
Maximum number of items a customer can have in a single wish list

projects.name: Product Review Service
projects.description: Collects, moderates, and publishes customer product reviews and star ratings; calculates aggregate scores and surfaces verified-purchase badges

entries.description: Review content and moderation queue
Service identifier
Automatically publish reviews from verified purchasers without manual moderation

projects.name: Bundle Manager
projects.description: Defines and manages product bundle configurations, bundle pricing rules, and component substitution policies for kit-based products

entries.description: Bundle definition and pricing store
Service identifier
Maximum number of component products allowed in a single bundle

projects.name: Commerce Analytics
projects.description: Tracks conversion funnels, abandonment rates, revenue attribution, and category-level sales trends; feeds data to the BI platform

entries.description: ClickHouse for commerce event analytics
Service identifier
Number of commerce events batched before flushing to ClickHouse

projects.name: Payment Processor
projects.description: Core payment orchestration service that routes authorisation, capture, and void requests to the appropriate payment provider based on card BIN and transaction rules

entries.description: Payment transaction and routing state store
Redis for idempotency keys and in-flight transaction locks
Service identifier

projects.name: Card Vault
projects.description: PCI-DSS compliant tokenisation vault that stores encrypted card data and issues surrogate PANs (tokens) for use by the payment processor

entries.description: Encrypted card data and token mapping store
Service identifier
Tokenisation algorithm used to generate surrogate PANs

projects.name: Payment Gateway
projects.description: External-facing gateway that receives payment requests from third-party merchants, validates signatures, and forwards to the internal payment processor

entries.description: Merchant registration and gateway config store
Service identifier
HMAC secret used to sign outbound payment event webhooks to merchants

projects.name: Stripe Adapter
projects.description: Wraps the Stripe API to translate internal payment commands into Stripe Payment Intents, handles Stripe webhook events, and maps Stripe error codes to domain errors

entries.description: Stripe secret API key for the environment account
Stripe webhook endpoint signing secret
Service identifier

projects.name: PayPal Adapter
projects.description: Integrates with PayPal REST APIs for PayPal Checkout, Pay Later, and Venmo payments; handles PayPal IPN/webhook events and order capture flow

entries.description: PayPal REST API client ID
PayPal REST API client secret
Service identifier

projects.name: Apple Pay Adapter
projects.description: Implements Apple Pay Web and In-App payment flows including merchant validation, payment token decryption, and Passbook integration

entries.description: Apple Pay merchant identifier registered in the Apple Developer portal
Path to the Apple Pay merchant identity certificate
Service identifier

projects.name: Google Pay Adapter
projects.description: Handles Google Pay payment token decryption, integrates with the Google Pay API for Web and Android, and maps payment method details for processing

entries.description: Google Pay merchant ID from the Google Pay Business Console
Path to the Google Pay payment decryption private key
Service identifier

projects.name: Fraud Check Service
projects.description: Evaluates payment transactions for fraud risk using velocity checks, device fingerprinting, address verification, and ML scoring before authorisation

entries.description: Fraud rule and detection event store
Redis for velocity counter windows
Service identifier

projects.name: 3DS Handler
projects.description: Implements 3-D Secure 2.x authentication flows: frictionless path, challenge flow, and exemption handling for SCA compliance under PSD2

entries.description: 3DS authentication session store
Service identifier
3DS Directory Server base URL for AReq/ARes message exchange

projects.name: Payout Service
projects.description: Manages disbursements to merchants and sellers via BACS, SWIFT, and Stripe Connect; handles payout scheduling, FX conversion, and regulatory reporting

entries.description: Payout batch and beneficiary store
Service identifier
Daily cut-off time (UTC) for including payout requests in the same-day batch

projects.name: Settlement Service
projects.description: Reconciles authorised payment captures against acquirer settlement reports, identifies discrepancies, and generates merchant settlement statements

entries.description: Settlement reconciliation and statement store
Service identifier
Cron schedule for the daily reconciliation run

projects.name: Chargeback Service
projects.description: Manages the chargeback dispute lifecycle: evidence collection, counter-response submission to acquirers, and tracking dispute outcomes and financial impact

entries.description: Chargeback dispute and evidence store
Service identifier
Maximum number of days to submit counter-evidence to the acquirer

projects.name: Digital Wallet Service
projects.description: Manages Meridian stored-value wallets: top-up via payment methods, peer-to-peer transfers, balance enquiry, and transaction history

entries.description: Wallet balance ledger and transfer store
Service identifier
Maximum wallet balance in GBP permitted per account

projects.name: Currency Converter
projects.description: Provides real-time and cached FX rates from ECB and open exchange-rate feeds; converts amounts for multi-currency checkout and display

entries.description: Redis for FX rate cache
Service identifier
Maximum age of cached FX rates before a live refresh is triggered

projects.name: Payment Audit Service
projects.description: Provides an immutable, tamper-evident log of all payment events for PCI-DSS audit purposes, financial forensics, and regulatory inspection

entries.description: Immutable payment audit event store
Service identifier
Payment audit record retention period in years

projects.name: Payment Routing Service
projects.description: Applies dynamic routing logic to distribute payment transactions across acquirers based on BIN, currency, success rate, and cost optimisation rules

entries.description: Routing rule and acquirer performance store
Redis for acquirer health score cache
Service identifier
